summary: Created the Zero Click OSINT card component: `src/ui/osint-card.ts` exports `OsintCardData` interface, `createOsintCard()` factory function (renders title, value, source, confidence badge with modifier classes, and why-it-matters), and `createOsintCardList()` for rendering multiple cards in a responsive grid. Added `src/styles/osint-card.css` using design tokens throughout, with confidence-level badge colors (success/warning/danger), reduced-motion support, and responsive 1→2 column grid at md breakpoint. Imported the CSS in `global.css`. All 33 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
